label: 36, 37 Repealed. , (i), ,Pub. L. 91–271, title III, § 321(h)84 Stat. 293June 2, 1970
notes: Section 36, acts , ; , ; , , enumerated duties of deputy collectors.Feb. 6, 1907, ch. 47134 Stat. 880Mar. 4, 1923, ch. 251, § 242 Stat. 1453Jan. 13, 1925, ch. 7643 Stat. 748
Section 37, R.S. § 2633, authorized Secretary of the Treasury to clothe any deputy director at a port other than district headquarters with all powers of his principal appertaining to official acts.
